title: [v4.2.0-rhel] Update buildah for CVE-2024-11218
body:

comments.body: Windows cross-compile is broke but we don't support this branch with `podman machine` anymore so that should be fine. You may want to rip it out of the Cirrus config though.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *dashea*, *giuseppe* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman).
